kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 20000.0, "tracesDir": "/Users/nookdoppio/Documents/GitHub/assign-automation-mar-2026/testcases/browser/browser/traces/temp/817c302c-d5f1-4659-9db1-97b929e8ee70"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.gother.online/en-us
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Handle cookie consent if present
Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=button:text-is("Accept All") at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=button:text-is("Accept All") at state hidden
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Cookie consent didn't appear within ${timeout}, skipping...
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Logic ถ้า ${status} เป็น True (เจอคุกกี้) จะเข้าเงื่อนไขคลิกยอมรับ Logic ถ้าเป็น False (ไม่เจอคุกกี้บอทจะข้ามไปทำขั้นตอนถัดไปทันทีโดยไม่เสียเวลา
